name: TotalReclaw
description: End-to-end encrypted memory vault for AI agents

publicUrl.description: Public gateway URL for QR pairing (e.g. 'https://gateway.example.com:18789'). Overrides the buildPairingUrl auto-resolution cascade.

model.description: Shorthand: override just the extraction model (e.g., 'glm-4.5-flash', 'gpt-4.1-mini'). Use extraction.llm for a full provider override.

interval.description: Number of turns between automatic extractions (default: 3)

maxFactsPerExtraction.description: Hard cap on facts extracted per turn (default: 15)

llm.description: Explicit LLM override. Highest-priority tier in the extraction-provider cascade.

provider.description: Provider name: zai | openai | anthropic | gemini | google | mistral | groq | deepseek | openrouter | xai | together | cerebras.

model.description: Explicit model id. If omitted, a cheap default is derived.

apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.

baseUrl.description: Override the provider base URL (self-hosted / custom gateway setups).
